## Test Cases

### TC-KNB-001: UAT — AC-1: it is reviewed by an appropriate subject matter expert before becoming visible within the search

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **TC ID** | TC-KNB-001 |
| **ALM ID** | *(pending — set by /alm sync)* |
| **Area Path** | IS - D365 Avanade\f598-knowledge-articles-structured-knowledge-authoring-and-approv\KNB |
| **Iteration Path** | IS - D365 Avanade\Discovery |
| **Priority** | 1 |
| **Assigned To** | Business User |
| **State** | Design |
| **Automation** | Manual |
| **Test Type** | UAT |
| **Mapped FR** | *(pending — run /plan first)* |
| **User Story** | *(pending — run /plan first)* |
| **Mapped AC** | AC-1 |

**Preconditions:**
- UAT environment seeded with anonymised business data.
- Business user briefed on the scenario.

**Test Steps:**
| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Setup: a new KB article is created in D365 | Test scenario state is ready |
| 2 | Perform: it is submitted for publication | Action executes |
| 3 | Validate: it is reviewed by an appropriate subject matter expert before becoming visible within the search | Outcome matches business expectation |

**Post-conditions:**
- Business user confirms outcome meets the operational requirement.

**Test Data:**
- Anonymised PII; representative master-data volumes.

**Notes:**
UAT sign-off is required per §7 Exit Criteria of the test plan.
